overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character riding a winged spectral mount through a vast snowy mountain landscape dotted with ancient ruins, transitioning into a toxic green fog zone with dense dead forests. The camera maintains a steady third-person aerial perspective as the player explores the atmospheric open world from high altitude down to tree canopy level.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain valley with scattered ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over the snowy valley on a winged mount, surveying the ancient ruins and mountain landscape below

entered.detail: vast snow-filled valley stretching between mountain ranges with visible terrain undulations
large stone ruins with broken walls and collapsed structures scattered across the valley floor
towering snow-capped mountains forming the valley boundary with jagged peaks
sparse evergreen trees dotting the snowy slopes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a snow-covered mountain valley at dusk. The player rides a winged mount over ancient stone ruins scattered across the valley floor, with towering mountain ranges visible in the distance. The atmosphere is cold and desolate, with diffuse overcast lighting and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain pass between towering snow-covered peaks

events.description: mount banks left to navigate through a narrow gap between mountain peaks
atmosphere shifts dramatically from blue-gray snow to sickly green toxic fog as the player enters a corrupted zone

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through mountain passes and beginning descent toward the toxic valley ahead

entered.detail: sheer snow-dusted rock face passing close to the camera
thick greenish-yellow fog indicating a corrupted or poisoned area ahead

segments.scene_description: The player navigates through a narrow mountain pass with rocky cliffs passing nearby. The camera banks to follow the winged mount through the terrain. Toward the end of the segment, the environment transitions dramatically as sickly green toxic fog appears in the distance, signaling entry into a corrupted biome.

scene_state.functional_zone: toxic swamp forest with dense dead pines and low visibility

events.description: lighting dims significantly entering the dense green fog and tree cover
mount descends rapidly through the forest canopy toward the ground

agents.ego_description: flying low through the toxic fog and weaving between dead trees while descending toward the forest floor

entered.detail: thick cluster of dead pine trees with bare branches reaching upward through the fog
small ruined stone structure partially visible through the mist

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place entirely within a toxic green fog zone. The player descends from aerial height down through a dense forest of dead pines, with visibility severely reduced by the thick mist. The lighting becomes much darker and greener, creating an oppressive atmosphere as the mount weaves between tree trunks toward the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey from a desolate, snow-covered mountain valley into a suffocating, toxic forest. It begins with a wide view of ancient stone ruins scattered across a cold valley floor under a diffuse, overcast dusk sky. As the camera banks to follow the winged mount through a narrow pass of rocky cliffs, the distant horizon begins to shift, revealing a creeping wall of sickly green fog. The scene then descends from the heights into this corrupted biome, where the lighting turns dark and oppressive. Finally, the mount weaves through a dense canopy of dead pines as the thick green mist severely reduces visibility, bringing the camera down toward the forest floor.
